CustomField.description: CRM-396 : gestion de différents types de demandes de Vilogia.
CustomField.formula: IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(Type, 'Dépannage'),MCS_IsBTCQ__c== FALSE), '0000000003', IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(Type, 'Travaux'),MCS_IsBTCQ__c== FALSE), '0000000003', IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(Type, 'Travaux'),MCS_IsBTCQ__c== TRUE), '0000000045', '')))
CustomField.label: MCS_TypeDeDemande
